'''âl-p-s''' ('''kalapas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:luxuriate|luxuriate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-p-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:luxuriate|luxuriate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-p-s
|-
! Lemma
| kalapas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilapas|thilapas]] || [[word:jilapas|jilapas]] || [[word:shilapas|shilapas]] || [[word:kilapas|kilapas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulapas|thuthulapas]] || [[word:jujulapas|jujulapas]] || [[word:shushulapas|shushulapas]] || [[word:kukulapas|kukulapas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulapas|thulapas]] || [[word:julapas|julapas]] || [[word:shulapas|shulapas]] || [[word:kulapas|kulapas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulapas|thulapas]] || [[word:julapas|julapas]] || [[word:shulapas|shulapas]] || [[word:kulapas|kulapas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelapas|thelapas]] || [[word:jelapas|jelapas]] || [[word:shelapas|shelapas]] || [[word:kelapas|kelapas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholapas|thotholapas]] || [[word:jojolapas|jojolapas]] || [[word:shosholapas|shosholapas]] || [[word:kokolapas|kokolapas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholapas|tholapas]] || [[word:jolapas|jolapas]] || [[word:sholapas|sholapas]] || [[word:kolapas|kolapas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholapas|tholapas]] || [[word:jolapas|jolapas]] || [[word:sholapas|sholapas]] || [[word:kolapas|kolapas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlapas|thĂŠlapas]] || [[word:jĂŠlapas|jĂŠlapas]] || [[word:shĂŠlapas|shĂŠlapas]] || [[word:kĂŠlapas|kĂŠlapas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalapas|thathalapas]] || [[word:jajalapas|jajalapas]] || [[word:shashalapas|shashalapas]] || [[word:kakalapas|kakalapas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalapas|thalapas]] || [[word:jalapas|jalapas]] || [[word:shalapas|shalapas]] || [[word:kalapas|kalapas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalapas|thalapas]] || [[word:jalapas|jalapas]] || [[word:shalapas|shalapas]] || [[word:kalapas|kalapas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalapas|shalapas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalapas|goshalapas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalapas|gokishalapas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalapasnĂŒ|shalapasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalapasnknĂŒ|goshalapasnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalapasnĂŒ|gokishalapasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalapashĂ«|shalapashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalapasnkshĂ«|goshalapasnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalapashĂ«|gokishalapashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalapasro|shalapasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalapasnkro|goshalapasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalapasro|gokishalapasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalapasmu|shalapasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalapasnkmu|goshalapasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalapasmu|gokishalapasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalapasher|shalapasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalapasnksher|goshalapasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalapasher|gokishalapasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalapasng|shalapasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalapasnkng|goshalapasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalapasng|gokishalapasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalapasya|shalapasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalapasnkya|goshalapasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalapasya|gokishalapasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalapasyam|shalapasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalapasnkyam|goshalapasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalapasyam|gokishalapasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalapasnĂŒshĂ«|shalapasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalapasnknĂŒshĂ«|goshalapasnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalapasnĂŒshĂ«|gokishalapasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalapasnĂŒro|shalapasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalapasnknĂŒro|goshalapasnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalapasnĂŒro|gokishalapasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalapasnĂŒmu|shalapasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalapasnknĂŒmu|goshalapasnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalapasnĂŒmu|gokishalapasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalapashĂ«nĂŒ|shalapashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalapasnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshalapasnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalapashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishalapashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalapashĂ«ro|shalapashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalapasnkshĂ«ro|goshalapasnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalapashĂ«ro|gokishalapashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalapashĂ«mu|shalapashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalapasnkshĂ«mu|goshalapasnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalapashĂ«mu|gokishalapashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalapasronĂŒ|shalapasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalapasnkronĂŒ|goshalapasnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalapasronĂŒ|gokishalapasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalapasroshĂ«|shalapasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalapasnkroshĂ«|goshalapasnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalapasroshĂ«|gokishalapasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalapasromu|shalapasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalapasnkromu|goshalapasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalapasromu|gokishalapasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalapasmunĂŒ|shalapasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalapasnkmunĂŒ|goshalapasnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalapasmunĂŒ|gokishalapasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalapasmushĂ«|shalapasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalapasnkmushĂ«|goshalapasnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalapasmushĂ«|gokishalapasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalapasmuro|shalapasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalapasnkmuro|goshalapasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalapasmuro|gokishalapasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
